hero.subtitle: We design custom adventures that transform your perspective and reconnect you with what truly matters. Choose your setting and start writing your story.

packages.subtitle: We have carefully selected the best experiences around the world. Choose your next destination or contact us to build a custom trip.
packages.modal_whatsapp_msg: Hello Big Planners, I am coming from your website and I would like to receive information about the package to {{destination}}.

list.title: Paradise in Cancun
list.shortDescription: Wake up to the sound of the Caribbean, sink your feet into white sand, and forget about the clock in an all-inclusive sanctuary.
list.description: Cancun is the refuge where time stands still. This package offers a premium stay in an all-inclusive resort facing turquoise waves. Leave daily stress behind, enjoy exclusive gourmet dinners, and explore the mysticism of Mayan cenotes with private guides dedicated entirely to your relaxation.

list.title: Classic Europe
list.shortDescription: Walk the illuminated avenues of Paris, navigate the canals of Venice, and step through Roman history with everything perfectly planned.
list.description: A journey of self-discovery through the cradle of art and history. Forget endless lines and confusing transfers; travel on high-speed trains and rest in boutique hotels selected for their warmth and location. An experience designed so your only concern is to be inspired.

list.title: Adventure in Machu Picchu
list.shortDescription: Feel the ancient energy of the Andes at sunrise in front of the sacred citadel and reconnect with nature.
list.description: Exceed your own limits on a magical journey through Cusco and the Sacred Valley. You will travel on a panoramic train connecting you with the Andean landscape before witnessing the majesty of Machu Picchu. A transforming adventure backed by local experts to ensure your safety on every trail.

list.title: Essence of Japan
list.shortDescription: Walk beneath Kyoto's ancient temples and immerse yourself in Mount Fuji's mysticism before Tokyo's futuristic tomorrow.
list.description: The perfect clash between unaltered tradition and the technological future. Relax in a traditional onsen overlooking Mount Fuji, sleep in a historic ryokan, and travel by bullet train with continuous support and connectivity. An itinerary that will expand your horizons and change how you see the world.
includes: Combined accommodation (Hotels and 1 night in Ryokan)

authority.subtitle: Your dream trip shouldn't be a source of stress. We are the expert guide who accompanies you before, during, and after your adventure, shielding your experience from any risks.

stats.title: Proven Routes
stats.description: We have spent over 15 years designing proven and safe routes. We know every corner to prevent surprises and ensure your adventure is perfect.

stats.title: Stories with Happy Ending
stats.description: More than 10,000 travelers have transformed their lives, returning home with luggage full of memories and peaceful hearts.

stats.title: 24/7 Protective Shield
stats.description: You will never be alone in the unknown. Real-time human support that watches over your trip and resolves any unforeseen event in minutes.

stats.title: Certified Security
stats.description: Accredited by IATA. We comply with the highest global standards so that your investment and dreams are always protected.

testimonials.subtitle: The smile and peace of mind of those who have already walked their path with us.

list.name: Maria Fernandez
list.quote: Always dreamed of Paris, but feared getting lost in the details of planning. Big Planners organized everything perfectly; my only job was to walk along the Seine and feel absolute peace of mind, knowing that every detail was taken care of.

list.name: Carlos Mendoza
list.quote: Going to Japan terrified me because of the language barrier and cultural shock. Thanks to Big Planners' expert guidance, I felt safe at every step. I returned home as a different person, with renewed confidence after exploring the unknown without fear.

list.name: Salazar Family
list.quote: We were looking to disconnect from city chaos and reconnect as a family. Big Planners created a balanced itinerary where the children explored and we rested, achieving a deep emotional recharge and memories that will unite us forever.

faq.subtitle: We provide answers to your fears and objections before the journey to bring you absolute peace of mind.

list.question: What if an emergency happens abroad and I don't speak the language?
list.answer: Don't worry. With our 24/7 support via WhatsApp, you have an expert guide right in your pocket. If there are cancellations, medical emergencies, or language barriers, we take care of solving it for you immediately.

list.question: I want a unique trip, do I have to adapt to a rigid itinerary?
list.answer: Not at all. Your trip should be as unique as your story. We use our base packages as inspiration and tailor them completely to your tastes, pace, and budget. You decide the direction, we build the safe path.

list.question: I'm worried about payments and the security of my money
list.answer: Your peace of mind is our priority. We offer secure, encrypted payment gateways, interest-free monthly payment options with participating cards, and transparent contracts backed by international certifications like IATA.

list.question: What guarantees do I have if my plans change at the last minute?
list.answer: We know that life is unpredictable. That is why, before you book, we advise you on the most flexible cancellation policies from airlines and hotels, and help you manage rescheduling while minimizing costs to protect your investment.

list.question: Is it really worth hiring an agency instead of booking on my own?
list.answer: Booking on your own exposes you to hidden fees, online scams, and hours of frustration resolving problems. With Big Planners, you pay for peace of mind: negotiated rates, optimized routes, and the backup of an expert guide who stands by you at all times.

footer.description: The expert guide that transforms your travels into unforgettable stories. We design custom adventures with 24/7 support and security.
footer.nav_testimonials: What do they say about us?

whatsapp.msg: Hello Big Planners, I want to start planning my next big adventure.
